### OpenClaw AI 
OpenClaw AI Agent 100+ Skills24API 
- OpenClaw is an open-source AI Agent platform running 100+ automation skills locally.
- OpenClaw AI Agent 100+ 

### Hermes Agent AI 
Hermes Agent LINEEmailCRM 24
- Hermes Agent is an enterprise-grade AI automation assistant for complex multi-step workflows and system integrations.
- Hermes Agent AI LINEEmailCRM 

### Claude Managed AgentAnthropic AI Agent 
Claude Managed Agent Anthropic Agent Claude 
- Claude Managed Agent is Anthropic's official Agent framework enabling autonomous multi-step task planning and execution.
- Claude Managed Agent Anthropic Agent Claude 

### MCP — Model Context ProtocolAI 
MCP Anthropic AI Harness OpenClaw Hermes Agent Claude Managed Agent MCP 
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) is Anthropic's open protocol enabling AI tools to communicate and share resources. It bridges OpenClaw, Hermes Agent, and Claude Managed Agent into a unified AI automation infrastructure.
- MCP Anthropic OpenClawHermes Agent Claude Managed Agent
